SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM test_numbers WHERE num IN (1, 2, 3));
SELECT 10 IN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers WHERE num > 5);
SELECT 1 IN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers) OR 6 IN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers);
SELECT CASE WHEN 2 IN (1, 2, 3) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS result;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_numbers WHERE num IN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers WHERE num < 4);
SELECT 'Found' WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 IN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers WHERE num > 0));
SELECT DISTINCT num FROM test_numbers WHERE num IN (1, 2, 4, 5);
SELECT (2 IN (1, 2, 3)) AS is_member, (4 IN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers)) AS is_not_member;
SELECT 7 IN (SELECT num FROM additional_numbers) AND 1 IN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers);
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT num FROM additional_numbers WHERE num IN (SELECT num FROM test_numbers WHERE num < 10));
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN num IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS count_in_set FROM test_numbers;
